rubricContent.textProperty: The agent calls tools in a logical sequence: job context is loaded before resume analysis, resume analysis before scoring, and finalize_response is the last tool called. Each agent uses outputs from prior steps.

Tool arguments are relevant to the user request. The job_id correctly identifies the requested job. Candidate IDs passed to fetch_resume_analysis and fetch_candidate_scores match those returned by fetch_candidates_for_job.

For a 3-candidate ranking request, exactly 10 tool calls are made: fetch_job_context once, fetch_candidates_for_job once, fetch_resume_analysis three times, fetch_candidate_scores three times, fetch_bias_detection once, finalize_response once. No tool is skipped.
The response refers to candidates only by anonymous ID such as candidate-uuid-001. No real names, gender, ethnicity or institutional affiliation is mentioned.
